best_bet.reason: Only a 20% rain chance with mostly sunny skies means you can actually spend the afternoon here without dodging storms, and the 2 to 4 foot waves still deliver some fun with lower waterspout risk than the northern beaches.

counties.name: New Hanover County
counties.beaches: Wrightsville Beach · Carolina Beach · Kure Beach

counties.name: Brunswick County
counties.beaches: Oak Island · Holden Beach · Ocean Isle Beach · Sunset Beach
